title: Summarization Memory
constraints: Old messages must be replaced with a summary, not simply dropped
The summary must be generated by the LLM, not hardcoded
The most recent N turns must be kept verbatim alongside the summary
Total token usage should decrease compared to keeping full history
hints: Split history into two zones: a 'summary zone' (older turns) and a 'recent zone' (last N turns kept verbatim)
Use a separate LLM call to condense the summary zone into a paragraph whenever it grows past a threshold
Prepend the running summary as a system-level context message before the recent verbatim turns

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, AIMessage, SystemMessage

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Keeps every message — hits token limits on long conversations
history = [SystemMessage(content="You are a helpful assistant.")]

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    history.append(HumanMessage(content=user_input))
    response = llm.invoke(history)
    history.append(response)
    return response.content

# Simulate a long conversation
topics = [
    "Tell me about the history of Rome.",
    "What were the main causes of its fall?",
    "How did the Byzantine Empire continue?",
    "Explain the role of the Catholic Church in medieval Europe.",
    "What was the Renaissance?",
    "Who were the key figures of the Renaissance?",
    "How did the printing press change society?",
    "What led to the Protestant Reformation?",
    "Describe the Age of Exploration.",
    "How did colonialism affect indigenous peoples?",
    "What sparked the French Revolution?",
    "Explain the Industrial Revolution.",
    "How did World War I start?",
    "What were the consequences of World War II?",
    "Summarize everything we've discussed so far.",
]

for i, topic in enumerate(topics):
    reply = chat(topic)
    print(f"Turn {i + 1}: {reply[:100]}...")

print(f"\nTotal messages in history: {len(history)}")
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Keeps every message — hits token limits on long conversations
history = []

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    history.append(f"User: {user_input}")
    history_block = "\n".join(history)
    agent = Agent(
        role="Helpful Assistant",
        goal="Answer user questions with context from conversation history",
        backstory=f"You are a helpful assistant. Conversation history:\n{history_block}",
        llm=llm,
    )
    task = Task(
        description=user_input,
        expected_output="A helpful response",
        agent=agent,
    )
    crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
    result = crew.kickoff()
    reply = str(result)
    history.append(f"Assistant: {reply}")
    return reply

topics = [
    "Tell me about the history of Rome.",
    "What were the main causes of its fall?",
    "How did the Byzantine Empire continue?",
    "Explain the role of the Catholic Church in medieval Europe.",
    "What was the Renaissance?",
    "Who were the key figures of the Renaissance?",
    "How did the printing press change society?",
    "What led to the Protestant Reformation?",
    "Describe the Age of Exploration.",
    "How did colonialism affect indigenous peoples?",
    "What sparked the French Revolution?",
    "Explain the Industrial Revolution.",
    "How did World War I start?",
    "What were the consequences of World War II?",
    "Summarize everything we've discussed so far.",
]

for i, topic in enumerate(topics):
    reply = chat(topic)
    print(f"Turn {i + 1}: {reply[:100]}...")

print(f"\nTotal messages in history: {len(history)}")
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: Keeps every message — hits token limits on long conversations
history = []

def chat(user_input: str) -> str:
    history.append(f"User: {user_input}")
    history_block = "\n".join(history)
    agent = Agent(
        name="Assistant",
        instructions=f"You are a helpful assistant. Conversation history:\n{history_block}",
    )
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, user_input)
    reply = result.final_output
    history.append(f"Assistant: {reply}")
    return reply

topics = [
    "Tell me about the history of Rome.",
    "What were the main causes of its fall?",
    "How did the Byzantine Empire continue?",
    "Explain the role of the Catholic Church in medieval Europe.",
    "What was the Renaissance?",
    "Who were the key figures of the Renaissance?",
    "How did the printing press change society?",
    "What led to the Protestant Reformation?",
    "Describe the Age of Exploration.",
    "How did colonialism affect indigenous peoples?",
    "What sparked the French Revolution?",
    "Explain the Industrial Revolution.",
    "How did World War I start?",
    "What were the consequences of World War II?",
    "Summarize everything we've discussed so far.",
]

for i, topic in enumerate(topics):
    reply = chat(topic)
    print(f"Turn {i + 1}: {reply[:100]}...")

print(f"\nTotal messages in history: {len(history)}")

evaluationCriteria.label: Old turns replaced by summary
evaluationCriteria.description: Messages beyond the recent window are condensed into a running summary rather than kept verbatim

evaluationCriteria.label: Recent turns kept verbatim
evaluationCriteria.description: The most recent N turns are preserved word-for-word alongside the summary

evaluationCriteria.label: Token usage reduced
evaluationCriteria.description: The total prompt size grows sub-linearly compared to full history retention

evaluationCriteria.label: Summary captures key facts
evaluationCriteria.description: The running summary retains the important facts and context from older turns
